subject: A hooded ferryman poling a small boat through a dismal swamp at twilight, with a glowing blue spectral soul rising from the water in the foreground
description: A wide swamp scene rendered in deep blue-blacks and muted browns. A tall hooded figure stands on the stern of a narrow flat boat, holding a long pole or staff, silhouetted against a dim sky. The water is glassy and reflective, broken by dead skeletal trees rising from the muck. In the immediate foreground a ghostly blue figure emerges from the surface of the water, its form indistinct and luminous, the brightest light source in the composition. Dead branches frame the scene. The mood is somber, funereal, hushed.
foreground: glowing blue spectral soul rising from dark water, dead branches
background: skeletal dead trees, dim murky sky, distant swamp horizon
